CheckTitle: Check if E2E Networks object storage buckets have object lock enabled
Description: This check verifies that E2E Networks object storage buckets have object lock enabled to protect stored objects from destructive overwrites and deletion.
Risk: Buckets without object lock are more vulnerable to destructive overwrites and ransomware-style deletion.

Recommendation.Text: Enable object lock on object storage buckets to protect stored data from overwrite and deletion.
